userStories.title: Audit: inventory all DDL statements in boe_modelos_worker.py and other workers
acceptanceCriteria: Grep entire codebase for runtime DDL in apps/workers and apps/api
For each hit: record file, line, statement, and whether it is idempotent
Classify each as SAFE, RISK-IDEMPOTENT, or RISK-DESTRUCTIVE
Write inventory to docs/ddl-runtime-audit.md
Do not change runtime code in this story
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f docs/ddl-runtime-audit.md && grep -cE 'SAFE|RISK' docs/ddl-runtime-audit.md | grep -vE '^0$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-NO-AUDIT-DOC

userStories.title: Move RISK-DESTRUCTIVE DDL from workers to Alembic migrations
acceptanceCriteria: From P-01 inventory: take all RISK-DESTRUCTIVE entries
Create reviewed Alembic migrations for current schema state
Run migrations on a test DB before production
Remove destructive runtime DDL and replace with startup assertions
userStories.verificationCommand: rg -n --glob '*.py' "(?i)\b(DROP\s+TABLE|DROP\s+COLUMN|ALTER\s+TABLE[^\n]*(DROP|ALTER\s+COLUMN|RENAME|SET\s+DATA\s+TYPE))\b" apps/workers apps/api | rg -v "(apps[\\/]api[\\/]tests|apps[\\/]workers[\\/]tests|__pycache__|# )"; test $? -eq 1 && echo PASS || echo FAIL-DESTRUCTIVE-DDL-FOUND

userStories.title: Move RISK-IDEMPOTENT DDL to Alembic - remove all runtime schema changes from workers
acceptanceCriteria: From P-01 inventory: take all RISK-IDEMPOTENT entries
Workers only read and write data; no schema mutation
All schema is owned by Alembic exclusively
Run full test suite after changes
userStories.verificationCommand: rg -n --glob '*.py' "(?i)\b(CREATE\s+EXTENSION|CREATE\s+TABLE|ALTER\s+TABLE|DROP\s+TABLE|CREATE\s+(UNIQUE\s+)?INDEX|ADD\s+COLUMN|DROP\s+COLUMN)\b" apps/workers/boe_modelos_worker.py apps/workers/ley13_2023.py apps/workers/prospectos.py apps/workers/csdr.py apps/workers/dac_directives.py apps/workers/ley112009_socimi.py apps/workers/ley222014_lecr.py apps/workers/jurisprudencia.py apps/workers/entity_identity.py apps/workers/screening.py apps/workers/screening_real.py apps/api/services/webhook_verification.py; test $? -eq 1 && pytest apps/ -q && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Schedule mcp_deep_contract_audit.py in weekly cron alongside accuracy check
acceptanceCriteria: Verify scripts/mcp_deep_contract_audit.py runs cleanly
Add it to scripts/weekly-accuracy-check.sh after mcp_validation_suite
Ensure cron invokes the weekly check with audit output
Test-run weekly accuracy check
userStories.verificationCommand: bash -n scripts/weekly-accuracy-check.sh && grep -i 'mcp_deep_contract_audit' scripts/weekly-accuracy-check.sh && python scripts/maintenance/mcp_deep_contract_audit.py --help >/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL-DEEP-AUDIT-NOT-IN-WEEKLY

userStories.title: Extend freshness check to all 11 pending domains
acceptanceCriteria: Add freshness checks for BORME, DGT/TEAC, AEPD, BDE, BDNS, SEPBLAC, CENDOJ, FATCA/GIIN, OFAC, CDI, PGC
Use domain-specific stale thresholds
Inactive domains with no sync_log rows log INFO, not STALE
weekly-accuracy-check.sh covers all target domains

userStories.title: Configure offsite immutable backup - second provider, 30-day retention
acceptanceCriteria: Choose a second provider outside the VPS provider
Create scripts/backup-offsite.sh
Upload, verify remote size, prune older than 30 days
No credentials stored in repo
userStories.verificationCommand: bash scripts/backup-offsite.sh && echo PASS || echo FAIL-BACKUP-SCRIPT-ERROR

userStories.title: Test offsite backup restore - not just upload existence
acceptanceCriteria: Download most recent offsite backup
Restore to esdata_offsite_test, never production
Verify key row counts
Drop test DB after verification and document evidence
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -tAc 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aeat_modelo' esdata_offsite_test 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '^[0-9]$' && echo PASS || echo 'FAIL or test DB not found'

userStories.title: Add backup offsite status to /status and weekly accuracy check
acceptanceCriteria: Add last_offsite_backup_age_hours to /status
weekly-accuracy-check.sh fails if backup is stale
backup-offsite.sh writes last successful timestamp
/status shows backup freshness alongside api/db/stale workers
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/status | jq '.last_offsite_backup_age_hours' | grep -vE '^null$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-BACKUP-STATUS-NOT-IN-STATUS-ENDPOINT

userStories.title: Final verification - all risk items closed, tests green, system clean
acceptanceCriteria: 0 runtime DDL in workers
Deep contract audit scheduled
Freshness covers all target domains
Offsite backup status is exposed
Tests and mcp_validation_suite are green
Write docs/risk-reduction-report.md
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -E 'passed' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/status | jq '{api, db, stale_workers_count, last_offsite_backup_age_hours}' | grep -v 'null' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
